title: Adaptive and Agentic RAG Loops · Scenario Checkpoint
summary: A release board compares near-miss decisions for adaptive and agentic rag loops and accepts only runnable changed-case evidence, safe abstention, explicit uncertainty, and named native-model, vector-store, provider, load, security, recovery, or production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for bounded adaptive retrieval state machine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Route no-retrieval, lexical, dense, hybrid, structured, web, or human paths using explicit features, authority, cost, risk, and evaluated fallback.
Run bounded retrieve-read-critique-refine cycles with query lineage, evidence gain, duplicate detection, stop reasons, and total budget.
Separate retrieval from tools and enforce per-call schema, least privilege, tenant, data, egress, confirmation, timeout, and effect evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

Build deterministic Python evidence to bound adaptive retrieval, decomposition, tool authority, confidence, stop reasons, and loop evidence; retain corpus, document, chunk, model, index, prompt, query, and evaluation version identity; then replace one exact identifier with a synonym and compare lexical, dense, and hybrid recall. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. stimulus.title: Rag Agentic Evaluation Stop failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed
lines.text: Agentic RAG quality is measured by answer text alone.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Evaluate task outcome, retrieval rounds, tool choices, evidence coverage, injection resistance, cost, latency, stop correctness, and recovery.

options.text: Run the boundary case, inspect the actual mechanism, then accept or repair the claim.
Accept the result because visible output is the highest authority. That claim does not survive the diagnose the hidden failure evidence boundary.

For diagnose the hidden failure, run one convenient Rag Agentic Evaluation Stop query, omit corpus and version identity, relevance judgments, tenant policy, changed documents, abstention, citations, failure and recovery, then accept a plausible answer as RAG proof.

steps.title: RAG and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Rag Agentic Evaluation Stop
steps.instruction:
Write the quiz evidence note for Rag Agentic Evaluation Stop: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A quiz RAG engineering team handles case 2411 during an incident-response knowledge search. Build deterministic Python evidence to bound adaptive retrieval, decomposition, tool authority, confidence, stop reasons, and loop evidence; retain corpus, document, chunk, model, index, prompt, query, and evaluation version identity; then remove one supporting source and require abstention instead of a plausible unsupported answer. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Evaluate task outcome, retrieval rounds, tool choices, evidence coverage, injection resistance, cost, latency, stop correctness, and recovery.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Rag Agentic Evaluation Stop.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For RAG and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Rag Agentic Evaluation Stop, keep Rag Agentic Evaluation Stop connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Evaluate task outcome, retrieval rounds, tool choices, evidence coverage, injection resistance, cost, latency, stop correctness, and recovery.
